content.json:
# Harness Quality Workbook

Issue-run monitoring for the agent-delivery-harness. **Fleet health** answers "is the harness healthy this week?"; **Issue runs** lists one row per (issue, version) run and drills through on `{Issue}`; **Version comparison** keeps the by-`harness.version` aggregates. Every panel scopes time via {TimeRange} and reads the App Insights table that matches the exporter span mapping (tool/lifecycle -> dependencies, agent/model -> customEvents). See docs/evaluation/dashboards/README.md for the panel to contract-field map and honest-metric caveats.

parameters.name: Issue
parameters.description: Drill-through target: set by clicking a row in the Issue runs grid (Tab 1); consumed by the single-run drill-down (Tab 2, #223).

content.json:
## Fleet health — the 5-second answer

KPI panels over {TimeRange}. **In-flight** runs (a run counted at its `worktree_create` step with no `finish` span yet) are surfaced here for the first time. Pass rate carries an explicit `runs` denominator; a null rate over an empty window is rendered honestly (measured-zero vs. absent), never a fabricated 0.

content.query: dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend issue = tostring(customDimensions['harness.issue']), hv = tostring(customDimensions['harness.version']), step = tostring(customDimensions['harness.lifecycle_step']) | summarize started = countif(step == 'worktree_create'), finished = countif(step == 'finish') by issue, hv | summarize runs_finished = countif(finished > 0), runs_in_flight = countif(started > 0 and finished == 0) | extend runs_started = runs_finished + runs_in_flight | project runs_finished, runs_in_flight, runs_started
content.title: Runs: finished vs in-flight (explicit denominators)

content.query: dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend outcome = tostring(customDimensions['harness.outcome']), step = tostring(customDimensions['harness.lifecycle_step']) | where step == 'finish' | summarize passed = countif(outcome == 'pass'), runs = count() | extend pass_rate = iff(runs == 0, real(null), todouble(passed) / todouble(runs)) | project passed, runs, pass_rate
content.title: Pass rate (finish outcomes, explicit denominator)

content.query: dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend step = tostring(customDimensions['harness.lifecycle_step']), feature = tostring(customDimensions['harness.feature_id']) | where step in ('green_handback', 'red_handback') | summarize greens = countif(step == 'green_handback'), reds_after = countif(step == 'red_handback') by feature | summarize free = countif(greens > 0 and reds_after == 0), ['of'] = count() | extend red_reentry_free_rate = iff(['of'] == 0, real(null), todouble(free) / todouble(['of'])) | project free, ['of'], red_reentry_free_rate
content.title: red_reentry_free_rate (fleet, explicit denominator)

content.query: dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend step = tostring(customDimensions['harness.lifecycle_step']), feature = tostring(customDimensions['harness.feature_id']) | where step == 'deviation' | summarize deviations = count(), features = dcount(feature)
content.title: Deviation count (measured zero is a real 0)

content.query: customEvents | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend model = tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.request.model']) | extend input_tokens = toreal(measurements['gen_ai.usage.input_tokens']), output_tokens = toreal(measurements['gen_ai.usage.output_tokens']) | summarize input_tokens = sum(input_tokens), output_tokens = sum(output_tokens), runs_with_tokens = countif(isnotnull(input_tokens)), runs = count() | extend tokens_status = iff(runs_with_tokens == 0, 'unavailable', 'measured') | project input_tokens, output_tokens, runs_with_tokens, runs, tokens_status
content.title: Token spend (tokens_status honesty — measured when an adapter emits gen_ai.usage.*; remaining gap Copilot-side #163)

content.json:
## Issue runs — one row per (issue, version) run

The core view: started/finished timestamps, in-flight vs. finished state, final outcome, features_green, deviations, steps_seen. Conditional formatting: **fail = red, in-flight = blue, deviations > 0 = amber**. Click a row to export the `{Issue}` parameter that drives the single-run drill-down (Tab 2, lands with #223).

content.query: dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend issue = tostring(customDimensions['harness.issue']), hv = tostring(customDimensions['harness.version']), step = tostring(customDimensions['harness.lifecycle_step']), outcome = tostring(customDimensions['harness.outcome']), feature = tostring(customDimensions['harness.feature_id']) | summarize started = minif(timestamp, step == 'worktree_create'), finished = maxif(timestamp, step == 'finish'), final_outcome = anyif(outcome, step == 'finish'), features_green = dcountif(feature, step == 'green_handback'), deviations = countif(step == 'deviation'), steps_seen = dcount(step) by issue, hv | extend state = iff(isnull(finished), 'in-flight', 'finished') | order by coalesce(finished, started) desc
content.title: Issue-run grid (row click exports {Issue})

content.json:
## Single-run drill-down

Parameterized on the selected `{Issue}` — select a run in the **Issue runs** tab to populate this view.

**Honesty stance:** missing or out-of-order lifecycle steps read as a gap; nothing is fabricated. When no run is selected the panels are honestly empty (hint: select a run in the Issue runs tab).

**Deferred:** the failure-detail **log** panel is deferred / unavailable (gated on #220) and is intentionally not shipped in this tab.

content.query: dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend issue = tostring(customDimensions['harness.issue']), step = tostring(customDimensions['harness.lifecycle_step']), outcome = tostring(customDimensions['harness.outcome']), dur_ms = todouble(customDimensions['harness.duration_ms']) | where issue == '{Issue}' and isnotempty(step) | project timestamp, step, outcome, duration_ms = dur_ms | order by timestamp asc
content.title: Lifecycle step timeline (ordered by span timestamp)

content.query: dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend issue = tostring(customDimensions['harness.issue']), feature = tostring(customDimensions['harness.feature_id']), step = tostring(customDimensions['harness.lifecycle_step']), role = tostring(customDimensions['harness.subagent']) | where issue == '{Issue}' and isnotempty(feature) | summarize reds = countif(step == 'red_handback'), impls = countif(step == 'impl_handback'), greens = countif(step == 'green_handback'), roles = make_set_if(role, isnotempty(role)) by feature | extend reentries = reds + impls + greens - 3, red_after_green = reds > 0 and greens > 0 | project feature, reds, impls, greens, reentries, roles | order by feature asc
content.title: Per-feature TDD loop strip (reentries > 0 = red_reentry)

content.query: dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend issue = tostring(customDimensions['harness.issue']), tool = tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.tool.name']), skill = tostring(customDimensions['harness.skill.name']), status = tostring(customDimensions['harness.exit_status']), dur_ms = todouble(customDimensions['harness.duration_ms']) | where issue == '{Issue}' and (isnotempty(tool) or isnotempty(skill)) | extend call = coalesce(tool, skill), kind = iff(isnotempty(tool), 'tool', 'skill') | summarize calls = count(), fail_calls = countif(status != '0' and isnotempty(status)), max_ms = max(dur_ms) by call, kind | order by calls desc
content.title: Tool & skill calls (this run)

content.json:
## Version comparison

The by-`harness.version` aggregates (the original pack) — the unit of comparison across releases. Consolidation into a first-class tab with a {Version} selector is #224.

content.query: dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend hv = tostring(customDimensions['harness.version']), outcome = tostring(customDimensions['harness.outcome']), step = tostring(customDimensions['harness.lifecycle_step']) | where step == 'finish' | summarize passed = countif(outcome == 'pass'), runs = count() by hv | extend pass_rate = todouble(passed) / todouble(runs) | project hv, runs, passed, pass_rate | order by hv asc
content.title: Outcome / pass rate by harness.version

content.query: dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend hv = tostring(customDimensions['harness.version']), step = tostring(customDimensions['harness.lifecycle_step']), feature = tostring(customDimensions['harness.feature_id']) | where step in ('green_handback', 'red_handback') | summarize greens = countif(step == 'green_handback'), reds_after = countif(step == 'red_handback') by hv, feature | summarize free = countif(greens > 0 and reds_after == 0), ['of'] = count() by hv | extend red_reentry_free_rate = todouble(free) / todouble(['of']) | project hv, free, ['of'], red_reentry_free_rate | order by hv asc
content.title: red_reentry_free_rate by harness.version

content.query: dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend hv = tostring(customDimensions['harness.version']), step = tostring(customDimensions['harness.lifecycle_step']), feature = tostring(customDimensions['harness.feature_id']) | where step == 'deviation' | summarize deviations = count(), features = dcount(feature) by hv | order by hv asc
content.title: Deviation rate by harness.version

content.query: dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend hv = tostring(customDimensions['harness.version']), tool = tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.tool.name']), status = tostring(customDimensions['harness.exit_status']) | where isnotempty(tool) | summarize calls = count(), fail_calls = countif(status != '0' and isnotempty(status)) by hv, tool | order by calls desc
content.title: Tool-call volume (dependencies)

content.query: dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend hv = tostring(customDimensions['harness.version']), skill = tostring(customDimensions['harness.skill.name']), outcome = tostring(customDimensions['harness.outcome']) | where isnotempty(skill) | summarize calls = count(), fail_calls = countif(outcome == 'fail') by hv, skill | order by calls desc
content.title: Skill-invocation volume (harness.skill.name)

content.query: dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend hv = tostring(customDimensions['harness.version']), step = tostring(customDimensions['harness.lifecycle_step']), dur = todouble(customDimensions['harness.duration_ms']) | where isnotempty(step) and isnotnull(dur) | summarize wall_clock_ms = sum(dur) by hv, step | order by wall_clock_ms desc
content.title: Wall-clock per lifecycle_step (dependencies duration)

content.query: customEvents | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend hv = tostring(customDimensions['harness.version']), model = tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.request.model']) | extend input_tokens = toreal(measurements['gen_ai.usage.input_tokens']), output_tokens = toreal(measurements['gen_ai.usage.output_tokens']) | summarize input_tokens = sum(input_tokens), output_tokens = sum(output_tokens), runs_with_tokens = countif(isnotnull(input_tokens)), runs = count() by hv, model | extend tokens_status = iff(runs_with_tokens == 0, 'unavailable', 'measured') | order by hv asc
content.title: Token / cost (customEvents measurements) - measured when an adapter emits gen_ai.usage.*; remaining gap Copilot-side (#163)

content.query: dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend hv = tostring(customDimensions['harness.version']), mode = tostring(customDimensions['harness.failure_mode']), outcome = tostring(customDimensions['harness.outcome']) | where outcome == 'fail' and isnotempty(mode) | summarize failures = count() by hv, mode | order by failures desc
content.title: Failure-mode view (harness.failure_mode)

content.json:
## Deferred metrics - explicitly UNAVAILABLE

The following contract-deferred metrics are NOT charted because trace-summary.v1.json does not carry them. They are shown here as explicitly unavailable / deferred / n/a, never fabricated:

- Review-blocking findings per issue: DEFERRED / unavailable / n/a - trace-summary v1 carries no per-verdict field (per-stage handback counts are only a labeled proxy). Needs an additive trace-summary v1.x extension.
- Per-feature attribution of tool calls: DEFERRED / unavailable / n/a - v1 tools[] has no feature dimension. Needs an additive trace-summary v1.x extension.

The red_reentry_free_rate panel above measures no-red-after-green re-entry. The token/cost panel measures tokens whenever an adapter provides gen_ai.usage.* (the Claude Code hook does) and renders an honest null (never a fabricated 0) when no run carried gen_ai.usage.* numbers. The remaining gap is Copilot-side token/cost capture, tracked in #163.
